description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, robust frame and a camouflage paint scheme, blending green, brown, and black patches across its exterior. The vehicle features four side doors with angular windows, a flat roof, and a prominent front grille with two vented sections on the hood. The front end is equipped with rugged bumpers and integrated headlights, while the rear displays a mounted spare tire and simple rectangular taillights. The SUV rides on large, metallic wheels with a five-spoke design, suitable for off-road or urban environments. Its overall appearance suggests durability and utility, with a design optimized for both protection and functionality.
description: A boxy, camouflage-painted SUV with four doors, rugged wheels, and a spare tire mounted on the rear. The vehicle features a robust, utilitarian design with vented hood and angular windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, vented hood, and angular windshield, with headlights and rugged bumper visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the camouflage pattern, two side doors, and large five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire mounted on the back, rectangular taillights, and the flat rear surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing two doors, camouflage paint, and the wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke metallic rims with a rugged, utilitarian pattern
